query: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) financing, capital raise, cash position and going concern status in 2026. Has the company raised significant capital or secured funding in Q2 2026 (April-June 2026)? What is their current cash runway?
answer:
I've completed my research on Virgin Galactic's (SPCE) financing, cash position, and going concern status in 2026. Here are the key findings:

## Bottom Line

**Going concern:** YES — Virgin Galactic formally flagged **substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern** in its Q1 2026 10-Q (filed May 14, 2026, under ASC 205-40).

**Q2 2026 capital raises:** YES, significant activity, but mostly balance-sheet/debt management rather than fresh cash:
- **April 2026:** ~**$52M** fresh cash raised via ATM equity program (the only genuine cash raise)
- **June 10, 2026:** Debt-for-equity swap — redeemed **$30.5M** of 9.80% First Lien Notes via 6.7M new shares (no cash)
- **June 22–29, 2026:** Exchanged **$52.5M** of 2027 Convertible Notes for equity, cutting that balance ~75% from $70.4M to $17.9M (no cash)

**Cash position:** ~**$251M** at March 31, 2026 (down from $338M at year-end 2025), plus the ~$52M April ATM = ~$303M entering Q2.

**Cash runway:** Tight — quarterly burn of **~$87–95M** against a Q2 FCF guidance of –$87M to –$92M implies only a few quarters of runway. The company is racing to reach its **Q4 2026 first-revenue inflection** (flight tests Q3, commercial flights Q4) and is bridging the gap through continued ATM dilution and debt-for-equity swaps. Management targets modestly positive quarterly cash flow in 2027 and positive annualized adjusted EBITDA in 2028.

The stock has collapsed ~71% from its June 1 high of $8.90 (a SpaceX-IPO-driven spike) to $2.57 by July 10, 2026, with shares outstanding rising due to the dilutive financing activity.

Full structured findings, data points, and sources have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic reports loss and warns on liquidity | SPCE Quarterly Report (10-Q)
sources.snippet: Cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash and marketable securities totaled about $250.5 million, and operating activities used $53.5 million of cash in the quarter. Management concluded substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern under ASC 205-40.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results (8-K Exhibit 99.1)
sources.snippet: Cash position of $251 million as of March 31, 2026; during April 2026 the Company generated approximately $52 million in gross proceeds through its ATM program with ~$87 million remaining.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic 8-K (June 22, 2026) — 2027 Convertible Notes Exchange
sources.snippet: Exchange of ~$52.5M of 2.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2027 for shares/pre-funded warrants, reducing 2027 Notes ~75% from $70.4M to $17.9M; VWAP floor $3.03, cap $4.09; close ~June 29, 2026.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic 8-K (June 10, 2026) — First Lien Notes partial redemption
sources.snippet: Redeemed $30,524,000 of 9.80% First Lien Notes due 2028 by issuing 6,734,960 shares; ~$172M First Lien Notes remain outstanding, none due until March 31, 2028.

sources.title: The Plumbing That Keeps The Rocket Alive
sources.snippet: $251M cash and ~$182M in 9.8% debt; expects to burn $90-95M quarterly until 2027 revenue; debt-equity swaps and ATM extend runway relying on market tolerance for dilution.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
sources.snippet: Ended Q1 with $251M cash including $11M ATM proceeds, excluding $52M raised via ATM in April; Q2 free cash flow guidance -$87M to -$92M; Q4 revenue expected; opex $70-80M by Q4.

sources.title: SPCE Q1-2026 Earnings Call - Alpha Spread
sources.snippet: $251M liquidity plus $52M April ATM; potential $10M 2028 note redemption in exchange for common stock; ATM $300M program with $87M remaining.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc. (SPCE) Stock Price - Yahoo Finance
sources.snippet: SPCE current price $2.57; 52-week range $2.13-$8.90; market cap ~$330M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Exchanged $52.5 Million of Convertible Notes
sources.snippet: Exchange reduced outstanding 2027 Notes ~75% from $70.4M to $17.9M to improve liquidity ahead of Q4 2026 commercial operation.
